titleStmt.title: SII 24.219: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 219. (A.R. No. 51 of 1936-37.) EAST WALL OF THE FOURTH PRĀKĀRA.

summary.p: Registers gift of tax-free land to the temple of Vēdanārāyaṇa-perumāḷ at Tirunārāyaṇapuram in Allakaṟai-nāḍu. Mentions Sundarapāṇḍya-chaturvēdimaṅgalam formed in the name of the king's elder brother (aṇṇāḻvi). The Tribhuvanachakravartin Kōnērinmaikoṇḍāṉ of this record may be identified with Jaṭāvarmaṉ Vīra-Pāṇḍya of the initial year A.D. 1296-97, in which case aṇṇāḻvi Sundarapāṇḍya may be identified with Jaṭāvarmaṉ Sundarapāṇḍya who ascended the throne in 1276 A.D.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvanaccakkaravattikaḷ koṉerimelkoṇṭā ṉallakaṟaināṭṭu tiru nārāyaṇapurattu vetanārāyaṇapperumāḷ koyil bhāgavatanampimāṟkku Iṉ ṉāyaṉārkku Amutupaṭi cāttuppaṭi Uḷppaṭa veṇṭum nimantaṅkaḷukku jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻacaruppetimaṅkalattu tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam paṭṭarkaḷ Iṟaiyili maṭappuṟam Uṭ
paṭa Iṟaiyilikaḷ nikki kuṭippaṟṟāṉa nilattil Aṟikil puravarinallūri (nallūri)l kārmaṟu nilam patiṟṟu veliyum Oru pūvi Añcekālum koṭṭaiyil Oru pū nilam kālum ka lam patiṉmuveliyum toṭṭiyattil kār maṟunilam Onpatiṟṟu veliyum lam Iruveliyum Āka nila coḻanallūriṟ kaṭṭaḷaiyil kārmaṟunilam paṉṉiraṇ
ṭaraiyum Āka nilam Aimpattiruveliyum Aṇṇāḻvi tirunāmattāl Eṟukiṟa cuntarapāṇṭiyac caruppetimaṅkalattu paṭṭarkaḷukku Iṟaiyiliyāka kārmaṟunilam muppattiru veli nikki Orupū kiḻaraiyum kārmaṟunilam paṉṉiraṇṭaraiyum Innāṭṭil tiruttalām m kāṭuveṭṭit tirutta ttalum nilam tirutti kuṭippaṟṟāṉa nilam kuṭiniṅkāt tiruviṭai yāṭṭam
ṟaiyiliyāṉa ṉilam tiruṉāmattukkāṇiyākavum Innilattu varum kaṭamai kuṭimai Epperppaṭṭaṉavum mutal paṭa Iṟaiyiliyāka tantom Ippaṭi Ivvolaiye piṭipāṭāka koṇṭu cantrādityavat celvatāka kalliluñ cempilum veṭṭik koḷka Ippaṭikku Ivai pāṇṭimaṇṭalattu miḻalaik kūṟṟattu tuñcaluruṭaiyāṉāṉa periyāṉ colaimalaic cokkan toṇṭamāṉ Eḻuttu tulyam .
Digital edition of SII 24.219 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
